name: Certo® Triple Berry Jam
recipeIngredient: 4 cups prepared fruit (about 1 quart fully ripe strawberries, 1 pint fully ripe red raspberries and 1 pint fully ripe blackberries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large pot with water and place jars on a rack. Bring the jars to a boil for 10 minutes.
2. Place flat lids in the saucepan filled with hot water. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat. Drain well before filling.
3. Stem and crush strawberries layer by layer. Measure 2 cups into a 6- or 8-quart saucepot.
4. Crush raspberries layer by layer. Measure 1 cup into the strawberry mixture in the saucepot.
5. Crush blackberries layer by layer. Measure 1 cup into the berry mixture in the saucepot.
6. Measure sugar into a separate bowl, scraping excess with a spatula for an exact measure.
7. Stir the sugar into the fruit mixture in the saucepot.
8. Add butter or margarine.
9. Bring to a full rolling boil on high heat, stirring constantly.
10. Quickly stir in the fruit pectin. Return to a full rolling boil and maintain it for exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly.
11. Remove from heat. Use a metal spoon to skim off any foam.
12. Ladle quickly into prepared jars, filling to within 1/8 inch of the top.
13. Wipe jar rims and threads. Cover with two-piece lids.
14. Screw bands tightly.
15. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright. After jars are cool, check seals.
